🗼 Navia Region - Complete Nuclear Collection Guide

📊 Navia Overview

CollectibleCountNotes
Gold Nuclear12Require puzzles, combat, or hidden chests
Black Nuclear18Mostly exploration-based, some require Source abilities
Red Nuclear8Bonus collectibles (not covered in this guide)
💡 Prerequisites: Before starting, make sure you have:
  • Unlocked Source Manipulation (main quest requirement)
  • Upgraded Migalaser to at least Level 2
  • Completed the Navia main questline (unlocks certain areas)

🗺️ Optimized Collection Route

This route covers all Gold and Black Nuclears without backtracking. Start from the Navia teleport waypoint and follow the numbered path.

📍 Stop 1: Coordinates (-480, 215)

Collectible: Black Nuclear #1

Location: On top of a rocky outcrop north of the waypoint.

How to get:

  1. From the waypoint, head north along the ridge.
  2. Use Source: Climbing Gloves to scale the cliff face on the right side.
  3. Jump to the peak — the nuclear is on a small platform.

📍 Stop 2: Coordinates (-350, 190)

Collectible: Gold Nuclear #1

Location: Inside a cave behind a waterfall.

How to get:

  1. Head east from Stop 1 toward the waterfall.
  2. Use Source: Hoverboard to cross the river.
  3. Walk behind the waterfall into the hidden cave.
  4. Defeat the Level 35 Ruin Guard inside.
  5. Open the chest to claim the Gold Nuclear.
💡 Tip: The Ruin Guard is weak to Fire damage. Bring a fire weapon or use Source: Flame Burst.

📍 Stop 3: Coordinates (-220, 280)

Collectible: Black Nuclear #2

Location: On a floating island above the ruins.

How to get:

  1. Head northeast to the ancient ruins.
  2. Find the Source Pillar (blue glowing stone) in the center of the ruins.
  3. Use Source: Teleportation on the pillar to launch upward.
  4. While airborne, use Source: Glider to reach the floating island.
  5. The nuclear is on the island's edge, near a broken statue.

📍 Stop 4: Coordinates (-150, 350)

Collectible: Gold Nuclear #2 (Puzzle)

Location: Inside the Sealed Temple.

Puzzle Solution:

  1. Enter the Sealed Temple (large stone door to the north).
  2. You'll find 3 Source Torches in the main chamber.
  3. Puzzle: Light the torches in the correct order. The hint is on the wall: "Sun rises in the east, sets in the west."
  4. Solution: Light them in order: East → North → West (left to right from the entrance).
  5. The chest opens, granting Gold Nuclear #2.
⚠️ Common Mistake: If you light them in the wrong order, the torches reset. Wait 5 seconds before trying again.

📍 Stop 5: Coordinates (-80, 420)

Collectible: Black Nuclear #3

Location: Underwater chest in the lake.

How to get:

  1. Head to the large lake east of the temple.
  2. Dive into the water (hold jump while swimming).
  3. Swim to the center of the lake — look for a glowing blue chest on the lakebed.
  4. Open it to get Black Nuclear #3.
💡 Tip: Equip the Aqua Suit cyberware (or equivalent Source ability) to extend your underwater breathing time.

📍 Stop 6: Coordinates (50, 380)

Collectible: Gold Nuclear #3 (Combat Challenge)

Location: Top of the Skywatch Tower.

How to get:

  1. Climb the Skywatch Tower (spiral staircase, 3 floors).
  2. On each floor, defeat the enemy wave:
    • Floor 1: 3× Level 30 Bandits
    • Floor 2: 1× Level 35 Elite + 2× Level 30 Bandits
    • Floor 3: 1× Level 40 Boss (Stone Golem)
  3. Reach the top and open the chest for Gold Nuclear #3.
💡 Boss Strategy: The Stone Golem is weak to Lightning damage. Dodge its ground slam by rolling sideways, then attack its back when it's recovering.

📍 Stop 7: Coordinates (180, 290)

Collectible: Black Nuclear #4

Location: Hidden behind a breakable wall.

How to get:

  1. Head southeast to the cliffside path.
  2. Look for a cracked wall (it has visible fissures and a slightly different texture).
  3. Use Migalaser or a heavy weapon to break the wall.
  4. Enter the secret room and open the chest.

📍 Stop 8: Coordinates (250, 180)

Collectible: Gold Nuclear #4 (Mini-Puzzle)

Location: The Mysterious Altar.

Puzzle Solution:

  1. Find the altar in the eastern hills.
  2. There are 4 Source Crystals placed around the altar.
  3. Puzzle: Use Source Manipulation to move the crystals onto the matching colored pads:
    • Red crystal → Red pad (north)
    • Blue crystal → Blue pad (east)
    • Green crystal → Green pad (south)
    • Yellow crystal → Yellow pad (west)
  4. Once all crystals are placed, the altar opens and grants Gold Nuclear #4.

📍 Stop 9: Coordinates (320, 100)

Collectible: Black Nuclear #5

Location: On a narrow ledge below the cliff.

How to get:

  1. From the altar, continue south to the cliff edge.
  2. Look down — you'll see a narrow ledge about 10 meters below.
  3. Use Source: Hoverboard to carefully descend.
  4. Walk along the ledge to find the nuclear in a small alcove.
⚠️ Caution: If you fall, you'll take damage. Save your game before attempting this.

📍 Stop 10: Coordinates (400, -50)

Collectible: Gold Nuclear #5

Location: Defeat the optional boss: Veteran Bandit Leader.

How to get:

  1. Head to the bandit camp in the southern valley.
  2. Clear the regular enemies first (5× Bandits).
  3. The boss spawns in the center of the camp.
  4. Boss Strategy: He uses dual daggers and teleports behind you. Keep your camera locked on him and dodge-roll when he vanishes. He's weak to Fire.
  5. After defeating him, loot the chest for Gold Nuclear #5.

✅ Collection Checklist

Use this checklist to track your progress. Mark each item as you collect it.

Gold Nuclears (0/5 collected)

Black Nuclears (0/5 collected)

💡 Pro Tips for 100% Collection

  • Save frequently. Some collectibles require precise jumps or puzzles. Don't risk losing progress.
  • Use the map. Pin each location as you go so you can return to missed items later.
  • Bring a full team. Some combat challenges are easier with support characters.
  • Check at night. A few collectibles only appear during the in-game night cycle (not covered in this guide, but keep it in mind).
